'''Kafleer Tredahl''' was an amateur [[Holocamera/Legends|holocam]] operator native to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].

When Kafleer's mother, named [[Zayna Tredahl]], was kidnapped in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], he appealed to [[Chertyl Ruluwoor (Human)|Chertyl Ruluwoor]] for aid.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:TemplateCommoner.png|250px|thumb|Every possible depiction of Kafleer Tredahl]]
Kafleer Tredahl appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.
